name: Susurrus of the Sinful Spoils
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>罪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>囁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ささや</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き
desc: Target 1 Illusion or Spellcaster monster you control; return that face-up monster to the hand or Extra Deck, then Special Summon 1 Illusion or Spellcaster monster from your GY or banishment. If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card. You can only use each effect of "Susurrus of the Sinful Spoils" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 Illusion or Spellcaster monster you control; return that face-up monster to the hand or Extra Deck, then Special Summon 1 Illusion or Spellcaster monster from your GY or banishment. If this card is sent to the GY to activate a monster effect: You can Set this card. You can only use each effect of "Susurrus of the Sinful Spoils" once per turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
Activates if sent to the Graveyard for cost
